chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-973 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 1430/18 28.02.2019 Mr. Wali Muhammad Khoso, Advocate for petitioners/applicants. Mr. Zaheeruddin Sahito, State Counsel alongwith Dr.Zahir Hussain Subuhpoto, Deputy Director, Live Stock, Tando Muhammad Khan, Dr. Abdul Qadir Junejo, Director General, Live Stock Sindh, Hyderabad and Dr. Ahtesham Rana, Director Animal Husbandry, Sindh, Hyderabad. -.-.-. In reply to the notice, the alleged contemnors have appeared and submit that the appointment process, which is contemplated in the order dated 19.10.2017, has not been finalized because of the ban imposed by the government of Sindh over the appointments. They jointly submit that if and when the ban is lifted and the pending process of the appointments is set on motion, the case of the petitioners would be considered in terms of order dated 19.10.2017. This statement has satisfied the learned counsel for the petitioners/applicants, who seeks disposal of this application in terms thereof. Accordingly, the listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
